title: Easy Netherite
description: Makes Netherite Ingots slightly easier to obtain.
body: Makes Netherite Ingots slightly easier to obtain. This mod makes it so you get 2 Netherite Scrap from Ancient Debris in a Stonecutter, then when crafting Gold Ingots and Netherite Scrap together you get 2 Netherite Ingots instead of 1.
